sglang.title: [Fix] Type annotation correction for UpdateWeightsFromTensorReqInput
sglang.author: U-rara
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In PR #4446 , we resolved a GPU memory leak in the update_weights_from_tensor function by changing the serialized_named_tensors field in the UpdateWeightsFromTensorReqInput class from a single serialized object to a list of serialized objects. However, the corresponding type annotation wa

sglang.title: [Feature] Support EAGLE 3
sglang.author: chromecast56
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add support for EAGLE-3: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.01840

Modifications

Add EAGLE3 speculative method to server args
Refactor llama.py, logits_processor.py to support capturing auxiliary hidden states
Modify eagle_worker.py to support EAGLE-3 token map + untied LM head
Add llama_eagle3.

sglang.title: Reduce computation and communication in DP attention
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The current implementation of DP attention gathers global input_idsand  then scatter hidden_states after input_layernorm. This PR removes this redundant gather and saves duplicate computation in input_layernorm. This PR also facilitates the integration of DeepEP (#4232).
Performance

Tes

sglang.title: Optimize Triton decoding kernel for dynamic workload
sglang.author: Alcanderian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current implementation of triton decode attention uses a static split for KV, which makes it unable to adapt to dynamically changing context lengths and batch sizes in an online environment, leading to performance degradation. Therefore, I refactored the code to improve performance un

sglang.title: [Fix] Fix raw_bs bug when using flashinfer mla and eagle
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix the bug mentioned in #4536: when bs != raw_bs when eagle replays cuda graph, seq_len_cpu needed by flashinfer mla needs to be handled.

Modifications
Fix bug

Accuracy
Launch
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3 --speculative-algo EAGLE --speculative-draft l

vllm.title: [Neuron] trim attention kernel tests to fit trn1.2x instance
vllm.author: liangfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We are trying to scale up neuron backend test infra, where trn1.2xl instance would be used for testing 1_core and 2_core unit test scripts.
One special test we are trying to handle here can run out-of-memory on trn1.2x instance. The temporary solution here is to trim the test case down to fit CPU me

vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Retire SGMV and BGMV LoRA kernels in favor of V1 kernels. This cleans up the tests and kernel dispatch logic.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] torchrun compatibility
vllm.author: hiyouga
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the vllm's offline inference when using torchrun as the external launcher in veRL broken after  #13591
When we launch vllm using torchrun with tp = 2 on 8 GPUs, the layout of the distributed world should be (DP = 4 * PP = 1 * TP = 2). However, we find setting VLLM_DP_SIZE to 4 causes t

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Fix validation of `logprobs` in `ChatCompletionRequest`
vllm.author: schoennenbeck
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This fixes the validation of logprobs and top_logprobs for ChatCompletionRequest so that the class accepts its own default values.
FIX #14351

Perhaps I misunderstood something, but I currently think that the comments of KV_T and CACHE_T in the CALL_RESHAPE_AND_CACHE_XX macros are swapped.
If my understanding is correct, this PR will fix them.
Please help to review~ Thanks! cc @comaniac @Yard1 @LucasWilkinson

vllm.title: MI325 configs, fused_moe_kernel bugfix
vllm.author: ekuznetsov139
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR:

Adds optimized configs for AMD Instinct MI325/325X.
Works around a bug in  fused_moe_kernel (fused_moe_kernel returns incorrect values if BLOCK_SIZE_K is larger than the fp8 scaling group size).

vllm.title: [MODEL] Add support for Zamba2 models
vllm.author: yury-tokpanov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for Zamba2 models (#9382), a series of mamba2-transformer hybrid models with shared attention blocks and LoRAs, applied to shared MLP and attention blocks, depending on the model. 1.2B and 7B models use RoPE for their attention blocks.
This PR is fully compatible with Zamba2 int

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix broken CPU quantization due to triton import
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: FIX #15030 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.title: [V1] Refactor Structured Output for multiple backends
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change does some refactoring of the V1 structured output
implementation to prepare for supporting multiple backends. This code is
already successfully in use in a branch to support a second backend. I
think it will be easier to review other backends if the refactoring goes
in first on its own.

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decode] Optimize Rejection Sampler with Triton Kernels
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR optimizes the rejection sampler in #13933 with custom Triton kernels.
By using the Triton kernels, the PR brings the following benefits:

Now we use the flattened shape [num_tokens, vocab_size] for the logits tensors, instead of [batch_size, max_spec_len, vocab_size]. This reduces the GPU me

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Avoid using Llama 8B model so the CI/CD can run on v5

vllm.title: fix long dtype in topk sampling
vllm.author: chujiezheng
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix the long dtype in topk sampling, since gather requires the indices to be the long dtype (int64)

vllm.title: [Misc][V1] Skip device checking if not available
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When importing vLLM on a CUDA platform without available GPUs, get_device_capability() returns None, so .get_device_capability().major will raise AttributeError. This happens when integrating vLLM with Ray, because GPUs won't be allocated to the driver process (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES is set to an empt

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Remove the duplication of layer instantiations for Pixtral.

vllm.title: [Model] Remove duplicated message check in Mistral chat completion request
vllm.author: b8zhong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Remove redundant message check: I don't think there's no reason to retrieve the last message twice, check its role twice, and set the same flag twice in succession. Think it was just a copy paste error :)
cc @fgreinacher

vllm.title: [Core] Update dtype detection and defaults
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes the following changes:

Default to auto dtype in tests to avoid overflow errors when testing models that are supposed to use bfloat16
Fix dtype detection for multi-modal models. Instead of checking just the text_config, we now check the following locations (from highest priority to low
